findings.title: Session refresh path lacks tenant ownership check
findings.summary: The refresh endpoint validates the session token but does not verify that the requested tenant matches the authenticated principal.
findings.impact: A user may refresh or access a session scoped to another tenant.
evidence: Token is validated, but ownership is not compared before downstream fetch.
remediation: Centralize ownership checks in shared policy logic.

notes: No rate-limit evidence was available in provided excerpts.
followup_tasks: Trace session refresh flow into downstream tenant fetches.
